name: Fractional Ownership Aircraft Program Exemption

eligibility.description: Must be a participant in a fractional aircraft ownership program where fuel taxes are paid under IRC 4043. Valid through September 30, 2028.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts air transportation in fractional ownership programs from the 7.5% ticket tax if the fuel used is subject to the section 4043 fuel tax.
